helpful: The provisioned petition and questions presented supplied the strongest case-specific evidence.
The statpack's fee-class, circuit, CVSG, and relist cuts calibrated the low certiorari base rate.
CourtListener MCP confirmed the timing and citation of Glossip.
gaps: The statpack described in the prompt did not contain the referenced salience-band table.
The broad eight-row corpus query required 432 ranged reads and about 113 MB while yielding only weakly comparable priors.
A structured corpus filter for cert-stage issue area or respondent-response status would improve similarity retrieval.
notes: The provisioned docket and petition were sufficient. External retrieval was useful mainly for calibration and citation confirmation, not for changing the case-specific assessment.
